redis.clients.jedis.commands

Interface HashCommands

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    JedisCommands
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    Jedis, JedisCluster, JedisPooled, JedisSharding, UnifiedJedis

    public interface HashCommands
